title: Opening for Store Manager at Borosil Global Group

jsonLd.title: Opening for Store Manager at Borosil Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Borosil Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhopal. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Borosil Global Group:
Borosil Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil Global Group!
